title: task_started event payload
description: Payload shape for the `task_started` event emitted by component and QA agents when a task issue transitions ready → in_progress. Formalizes the `branch: string | null` shape observed in Phase 1 walkthroughs: the nullable case covers tasks that escalate before cutting a feature branch (Task C pattern, Phase 1 retrospective Finding 5).

issue_url.description: Full URL of the GitHub issue whose state just flipped to state:in-progress. Must be an `https://github.com/<owner>/<repo>/issues/<number>` URL. Stable identifier for the task in the target component repo.

branch.description: Name of the feature branch cut for this task, rooted in the target component repo. `null` when the task escalated before a branch was cut (no-code tasks, `spec_level_blocker` raised at pickup, `autonomy_requires_approval` gating branch creation). A string value is the branch name exactly as it appears on the remote (no `refs/heads/` prefix).
